personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Senior PHP Engineer | Laravel & Symfony Expert
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Senior PHP Engineer specialized in Laravel and Symfony ecosystems. Expert in designing secure multi-tenant SaaS architectures, implementing Domain-Driven Design (DDD), and orchestrating complex fintech integrations (Stripe Connect). Proven track record in database optimization (PostgreSQL/Redis) and building resilient applications for mission-critical deployments.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France. Free access to the EU job market.

experience.title: Senior PHP Engineer
responsibilities: Laravel/Symfony Architecture: Architected mission-critical APIs using Laravel 11 and Symfony 6/7, enforcing Clean Architecture and SOLID principles.
Database Optimization: Optimized PostgreSQL configurations and queries, resulting in a 30% reduction in API response times.
Security & Compliance: Designed secure multi-tenant architectures with field-level encryption, managing sensitive data for thousands of users.

experience.title: Senior Back End Engineer
responsibilities: SaaS Backend: Led architectural redesign to Symfony 7, implementing modular monolith with event-driven synchronization.
Performance: Architected high-throughput data layers using LATERAL JOINs and materialized views, reducing DB load by 80%.
Fintech Integration: Developed Stripe Connect workflows for multi-party payouts and automated KYC verification.

experience.title: Independent Full-Stack Developer
responsibilities: Built Lexity MVP and Interly MVP from scratch for B2B clients using Next.js 15, TypeScript, Prisma, and PostgreSQL—demonstrating rapid skill acquisition in modern full-stack development.
Managed direct communication with clients for PHP/Laravel backend contracts, translating business needs into technical solutions and SQL optimizations.

experience.title: PHP Developer
responsibilities: PHP/Laravel Development: Contributed to web application development in agile teams.
Database: Complex SQL queries, Doctrine ORM optimization.

projects.name: Core-API: Laravel Multi-tenant Framework
projects.description: High-performance boilerplate for multi-tenant SaaS applications built with Laravel 11, featuring JWT authentication and automated tenancy switching.

projects.name: ZIRO.FIT: Fintech & Marketplace Engine
projects.description: Architected a dual-sided marketplace routing complex Stripe Connect payouts, utilizing advanced SQL to collapse N+1 queries.

education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
